nasb.text: So Jesus, perceiving that they were intending to come and take Him by force to make Him king, withdrew again to the mountain by Himself alone.

esv.text: Perceiving then that they were about to come and take him by force to make him king, Jesus withdrew again to the mountain by himself.

cnv.text: 耶穌知道群眾要來強迫他作王，就獨自又退到山上去了。

ccb.text: 耶稣知道他们想强行立祂做王，便独自退到山上。

csbs.text: 耶稣看出他们要来强迫他做王，就又独自退到山上去了。
